title: Indian Maritime University IMU CET Admit Card 2026
short_information: Indian Maritime University IMU has released the online application for Common Entrance Test CET 2026 will start from 05 February 2026 and the last date to apply will be 24 April 2026.candidates should read the IMU CET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the entrance exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Course and University List, information and other types of information and then apply. Indian Maritime University (IMU) IMU Common Entrance Test CET 2026 IMU CET Exam 2026 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: For UG / PG Course : General / OBC / EWS : 1200 /- SC / ST : 800 /- For BBA Course Only : General / OBC / EWS : 200 /- SC / ST : 140 /- For Research Programmes: General / OBC / EWS : 2000 /- SC / ST : 1500 /- Pay the Examination Fee Through Online Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking.
